name: airmcp
description: Apple-native MCP server for macOS and the governed connector layer between AI clients and Apple apps. Profiles and progressive discovery keep the client surface focused; HMAC-chained audit logs, per-call HITL, OAuth 2.1 + Resource Indicators, scope gates, rate limits, and an emergency stop govern actions across Calendar, Notes, Mail, Reminders, Contacts, Messages, Music, Finder, Safari, Photos, Maps, Podcasts, Weather, iWork, Google Workspace, Apple Intelligence, UI Automation, Shortcuts, and Context Memory. Native Swift bridges cover EventKit, HealthKit, PhotoKit, Vision, and Foundation Models. Local-first and multi-client.
